title: Communauté d'agglomération du Pays Voironnais
summary: The Communauté d'agglomération du Pays Voironnais is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Voiron. It is located in the Isère department, in the Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes region, eastern France. It was created in 2000. Its area is 367.3 km2. Its population was 93,573 in 2018, of which 20,248 in Voiron proper.
text:
The Communauté d'agglomération du Pays Voironnais is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Voiron. It is located in the Isère department, in the Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes region, eastern France. It was created in 2000. Its area is 367.3 km2. Its population was 93,573 in 2018, of which 20,248 in Voiron proper.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 31 communes:
